privileged_info_summary: The task requires agents to determine Protective Action Distances from CAMEO Chemicals ERG data for three chemicals during a rail derailment incident with night conditions and low wind. Verified data from CAMEO Chemicals: Chlorine (UN 1017) Table 3 rail scenario has a Protective Action Distance of 7.0+ miles (not 6.0 miles as claimed in metadata). Acrolein stabilized (UN 1092) Table 1 large spill night scenario has a Protective Action Distance of 6.9 miles. Chlorine Trifluoride (UN 1749) Table 1 large spill night scenario has a Protective Action Distance of 2.3 miles. One of three chemical distances in the metadata is incorrect.
